title: alchemilla vulgaris var. semisecta
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. semisecta, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Lady's Mantle include reducing menstrual cramps, promoting digestion, and supporting the immune system. Lady's Mantle is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used as a topical application, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
